name: reflect_reads_context_json
prompt: Does /reflect read reflect-context.json when available in the workspace root?

name: reflect_validates_content_hash
prompt: Does /reflect validate the content_hash in reflect-context.json against the current concepts.db mtime before using the data?

name: reflect_warns_stale_hash
prompt: Does /reflect warn when content_hash is stale and continue without graph data instead of using stale data?

name: reflect_uses_shared_concepts
prompt: Does /reflect use shared_concepts data from reflect-context.json for cross-project signal detection in Pass 3?

name: reflect_uses_hot_concepts
prompt: Does /reflect reference hot_concepts for concept velocity or trending pattern detection?

name: reflect_reports_graph_health
prompt: Does /reflect include a graph health section in its output reporting concept count, edge count, project count, and gate progress?

name: reflect_no_context_fallback
prompt: Without reflect-context.json present, does /reflect fall back to text-only analysis without errors?

name: reflect_trust_calibration
prompt: Does /reflect respect trust calibration by only surfacing signals backed by edge strength >= 2 or confidence established or higher?
